Tests the behavior of `Math.min` when given an object as an argument.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses the `assert` function to verify the behavior of the `Math.min` function when it receives an object as an argument. The test checks if the result of `Math.min({})` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number), which is the expected outcome when `Math.min` is given a non-numeric input. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific edge case for the `Math.min` function.
